svg.title: ECS Infrastructure with Dual Pipeline Architecture
svg.desc: Complete AWS ECS deployment showing infrastructure pipeline deploying CDK stacks and application pipeline building and deploying containers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the application code structure')
